category_sources: source_facts.description says libsail is a small fast image decoding library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the HappySeaFox/sail project.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available official documentation surface for SAIL/libsail.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies image decoding library purpose.
source_facts.executables lists sail-imaging as the project CLI.
